# bitbucketdc_repository (Resource)

Manages a Bitbucket Data Center repository.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "bitbucketdc_repository" "api" {
  project_key = "PLAT"
  name        = "platform-api"
  description = "REST API service"
  forkable    = true
  public      = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The human-readable name of the repository.
- `project_key` (String) The key of the project containing this repository. Forces replacement if changed.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the repository. Computed because Bitbucket always returns a value for this field.
- `forkable` (Boolean) Whether the repository can be forked. Defaults to true. Computed because Bitbucket always returns a value for this field.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the repository is publicly accessible. Defaults to false. Computed because Bitbucket always returns a value for this field.

### Read-Only

- `clone_url_http` (String) The HTTP(S) clone URL.
- `clone_url_ssh` (String) The SSH clone URL.
- `default_branch` (String) The default branch name. Populated once the repository has at least one commit.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the repository, in the format {project_key}/{slug}.
- `slug` (String) The repository slug (URL-friendly identifier). Derived from the repository name by Bitbucket. Cannot be set directly.
- `state` (String) The repository state (e.g. AVAILABLE, INITIALISING).
